title: IATF webusaiti
summary: Pa webusaiti ya International Accessibility Task Force.
problem: IATF yalekabila icifulo ca kusambilishishamo abantu ico bengalondolwela ifyo bapanga, ukulondolola amaprogramu, e lyo no kulangilila ababomfi ifyo balingile ukucita.
why: Iyi webusaiti yaba pa mpongolo ya IATF, kabili yalipangwa mu nshila ya kuti cibe icayanguka ukubelengamo, ukupilibula e lyo no kuwamya ifyebo.
scopeIn: Impapulo ishilondolola ifyo IATF yapanga ifisolobelo
Icisontelelo ca pa cintubwingi ica milimo ya IATF iyasuminishiwa, iyalebomba, ne yalembwa mu fipe pamo ne cifulo, uwakusunga, icikuulwa, ne cilangililo
Ipepala lya kupokelelapo ukulomba ne fomu
Amapepala ayalanda pa mitekele no bulondoloshi
Ulupapulo lwa ciNgeleshi ulwakwata ifyebo ifingapilibulwa
Ukutumika kwa Static pa Cloudflare Workers Static Assets
scopeOut: Ifilundwa fya pa cintubwingi, amaakaunti, nangu ukwingila
Ukusunga ifyebo fya mulimo, ifiba mu cipao ca mulimo cila muntu
Ukutumishanya mu nshita ya cine, ukwaba mu Discord
Ukulandelela amepusho ku milimo imo imo, iikala mu cifulo ca milimo yonse pa GitHub

title: IATF selfie
summary: Icilangililo ca IATF ica kale, icalembwa pa numa ya kufika pa cifulo ca kuimininako.
problem: Ukufwailisha pa nshita inono pa fya kubomfya insamushi ukupitila mu kabungwe ka IATF.
why: Ici citabo caba pa cintubwingi, nangu ca kuti abantu balileka ukucipanga.
scopeIn: Icilangililo ca pa kutendeka ica kubomfya inshila imo iya kusangilamo ifyebo ifibomfiwa ku cintubwingi
scopeOut: Ukubombako umulimo wa kukuula nelyo uwa kuwamya ifikope
Ifya kubomfya mu mulimo wa kupanga

title: Akabungwe ka IATF
summary: IATF community bot, archived after reaching a natural stopping point.
why: Ici citabo caba pa cintubwingi, nangu ca kuti abantu balileka ukucipanga.
scopeIn: Ukubomfya fye amalyashi ayalekanalekana pa milabasa ya cilonganino ca IATF, ukuibika pa cintubwingi
scopeOut: Ukubombako umulimo wa kukuula nelyo uwa kuwamya ifikope
Ifya kubomfya mu mulimo wa kupanga
